validation_output.note: First attempt timed out at 120s; retry with longer timeout completed successfully.

validation_output.summary: No whitespace errors; Git reported existing LF-to-CRLF working-copy warnings.

must_preserve_evidence.MP-004: Default /api/providers/export uses ProviderService.exportProviders, emits containsSecrets:false, and maps saved provider credentials to {status:'redacted'} or {status:'missing'} without apiKey.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-010: Redaction is implemented server-side in src/server/services/providerService.ts via toSecretFreeBundleProvider, independent of frontend masking.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-007: Export bundle is constructed only from selected saved provider records and does not include activeId, activeProviderId, or defaultProviderId.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-001: Secret-free bundle includes schemaVersion:1, kind:'cc-jiangxia-provider-bundle', exportedAt, containsSecrets:false, and provider records without raw credential fields.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-003: ProviderService.exportProviders reads the provider index but does not activate providers, sync settings, or export active/default selection.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-006: Focused server test confirms serialized export does not contain the stored key sk-test-key-123.

concerns: No direct service-level test was added in T005 because T004 already supplied API-level RED coverage and this task scope was implementation-only.
Unknown providerIds currently produce an empty/matching-only export rather than a 404; this is consistent with the contract allowing a clear/safe empty export state for empty selections.
consumer_evidence: Task evidence was consumed by downstream join points and final verification; see implement-tracker completed_checks plus this result validation_output.
